title: Rapid Model Architecture Adaption for Meta-Learning

methodology.goal: Integrate MAML framework into hardware-aware NAS to reduce search complexity

key_contributions: Proposed Hardware-aware Meta Network Architecture Search (H-Meta-NAS)
Theoretical reduction of search complexity from O(THC) to O(1)
Enabled rapid adaptation of model architectures to unseen tasks on new hardware systems
challenges_addressed: Over-parameterized sub-models in classic NAS search space causing overfitting in few-shot learning
Prolonged hardware profiling with many tasks and scarce computation resources

results.capability: Rapid adaptation of model architectures to unseen tasks on new hardware systems
